title: enable golint
body:
When migrating to golangci-lint, we disabled `golint` and over time forgot to reenable it. `golint` is critical to enforce clean code and prevent certain smells from making it into the code.

Enaling it is simple by removing the following line: https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/.golangci.yml#L24

The hard part comes after tackling all the reports.

comments.body: Well now is the time to work on this.

> Well now is the time to work on this.

Completely agree but we had no issue for it.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@baude You ready for this?  Or has this already been done?
